Bash(node -e "const en = require\('./src/locales/en.json'\); const cat = en.catalog; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(cat && cat.wizard, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); catalog=d.get\('catalog',{}\); wizard=catalog.get\('wizard',{}\); print\(json.dumps\({'catalog.wizard': wizard, 'catalog.registration': catalog.get\('registration',{}\)}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); console.log\('jsx:', d.compilerOptions?.jsx\); console.log\('jsxImportSource:', d.compilerOptions?.jsxImportSource\);")
